content.en:
"I have cultivated the heart of the other side, so I can cultivate the golden body of the other side of Xuanyang. "

"However, if you want to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, you need a lot of special materials, if you forcibly cultivate, the physical body will not be able to bear it, and it will collapse directly, and it will be 100% impossible to practice!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had now comprehended the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, so he could deduce the materials needed for the performance.

As long as he collects all the materials, he can go to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, but he may not be able to practice, and he may fail many times.

Therefore, the materials he needs to prepare are also astronomical.

He didn't know when he would be able to practice the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, but even if he couldn't practice it, he could also use the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang to perform some methods of transforming the golden body of the other side of the body through the golden body on the other side of the Xuanyang.

In this way, he can still quickly improve his strength, but it is not a complete golden incarnation on the other side, and the foundation potential is still somewhat different.

this day.

Ye Tian left from the Origin Upper Realm Skeleton and returned to Guheng Mountain.

It's not just that he's gone, but many other shore-level geniuses have given up.

They didn't want to waste their time here, only a few Other-level geniuses or Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were still here to comprehend.

......

Guheng Mountain.

After Ye Tian came back, he inscribed a lot of golden inscriptions on the other side and gave them to Gu Heng Mountain, so the Lord of Eternal Zero naturally didn't say anything, nor did they ask.

They didn't think that Ye Tian had comprehended the complete method of the Golden Body on the other side, so they didn't mention this matter.

But even if he really mentioned it, he wouldn't reveal it.

He also expected that the other other geniuses of Gu Heng Mountain would not be able to practice the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, after all, they had not even cultivated the heart of the other side!

In the entire seventy-two regions in the eastern part of the land of the Eternal Shore, only a dozen or so have cultivated the Heart of the Other Shore, and now they have all become the Origin Realm, and there is no way to cultivate the Golden Body on the other side of Xuanyang.

So, it's useless to say it.

Because this time, Ye Tian contributed a lot of the Golden Texts on the other side, as well as some Black Texts on the other side, so Gu Hengshan promoted his position.

He has changed from a first-level lord to a second-level lord, and his status is even higher.

But for him, the position of lord is of little significance now, so he doesn't care too much.

In the years that followed, he began to collect materials and bought a lot of the various materials that came back one by one.

However, some materials are so precious that even he is hard to come by.

For example, materials such as the East Pole Void Stone, the Vine Blood Beads on the Other Side, the Ancient Blood Marrow Fluid, the Glazed Dark Gold and other materials are extremely precious and very rare.

Gu Hengshan had several materials, but the contribution value required was too much, and he could only exchange a small amount.

And then.

His vest Dongyuan Lord exchanged some materials in the True Beast Alliance, but it was still not enough.

He needed a lot of materials to ensure that he could cultivate again and again, otherwise he would soon run out of materials and would not be able to continue cultivating.

And.

He still had to scrape together a lot of wealth to be able to afford these material resources.

"If you want to buy so many material resources, you can only go to the Eternal Night Pavilion to buy them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But now, even if the Eternal Night Pavilion was willing to sell it to him, he wouldn't be able to take out that much Eternal Ancient Gold!

So, he had to make money first.

However, in a short period of time, how to earn a large amount of eternal ancient gold is a big problem.

Selling the Golden Script and the Upper Haven is one way, but the Golden Text on the Other Shore can only be sold once in the Eternal Night Pavilion.

"I only handed over a small part of the Golden Script and the Haven on the Other Side to Gu Heng Mountain. Later, I can trade with the Eternal Night Pavilion for other Golden Texts and Havens on the Other Side, and they should be willing to trade. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But.

He can't really trade, and it's easy to be exposed.

Thereupon.

He asked the vest of the Lord of Dong Yuan to trade, even if it was exposed, there would be no problem with Jun Zu as the master, and the True Beast Alliance would not care about this matter.

this day.

Chen Yang's vest came to a very important branch of the Eternal Night Pavilion, and found a Nineth-Bone Transformation Realm primeval-level genius of the Eternal Night Pavilion, the Lord of the Yuan Pole!

Although the Lord of the Yuan Pole had never seen Ye Tian, the Lord of the Winter Yuan, the Lord of the Vest Winter Yuan, the Eternal Night Pavilion was the richest and most well-informed force in the Seventy-two Eastern Regions, so it was easy to know the information of the Lord of the Winter Yuan and let it out.

"Lord of the Winter Yuan, a rare guest!"

The Lord of Yuanji entertained Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian discussed the transaction with the Lord of Yuanji.

At this time, Ye Tiandao: "Lord of Yuanji, the Eternal Night Pavilion should buy the Golden Text on the other side, I have a batch of brand new Golden Texts on the other side, I don't know if the Eternal Night Pavilion will buy it?"

"Can you take a look at the new Golden Text?"

The Lord of the Yuan Pole asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took out the golden inscriptions he had engraved one by one.

Anyway, as long as he can't understand it thoroughly, he can't remember the golden text on the other side, so he is not afraid of the golden text on the other side being leaked.

The Lord of the Yuan Pole took a look at it and confirmed that most of these golden texts on the other side had not yet been acquired by Eternal Night.

So, he pointed out these golden texts on the other side and said, "These golden texts on the other side are indeed not available in the Eternal Night Pavilion, and the other side pavilion is willing to buy them, and is willing to give a high price." As for the other owned Jinwen, it can also be acquired, but the price is very low. "

After all, as long as it is inscribed, it has value, and if Ye Tian sells it, the Eternal Night Pavilion is still willing to buy it.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

They negotiate the price.

After a long time, the price was negotiated.

At this time, Ye Tian said the materials he needed to purchase: "The East Pole Void Stone, the Vine Blood Bead on the Other Side, the Ancient Blood Marrow Liquid, and the Glazed Dark Gold, there should be one in the Eternal Night Pavilion, right?"

"Yes!" said the Lord of the Primal Pole, "but these materials are very rare, so the price is very high. "

"No matter what the price, I bought it!"

Ye Tian looked very arrogant.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the Eternal Ancient Gold obtained from selling the Golden Text on the Other Side and the Haven on the Other Shore to buy these materials, but in the end, the materials he bought were not too much, because the price of these material resources was too high.

However, these materials were completely combined, enough for him to cultivate many times.

But if he wants to get more materials, he has to make money.

However, selling the Golden Text on the Other Side and the Haven on the Other Shore no longer worked, and he had to think of other ways to do it.

"Let's cultivate first, if there is any shortage, then continue to make money to buy material resources. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the following years, he used these materials to begin to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of primeval epochs have passed.
